news_items.text:
Switzerland vs Algeria Preview, Lineups & Team News | RotoWire

# Switzerland vs Algeria Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 32

Switzerland vs Algeria 2026 World Cup Round of 32 preview at BC Place, Vancouver. Predicted lineups, team news, tactical breakdown and score prediction.

Updated on July 2, 2026 3:02AM EST

Share

By:

Pierre Courtin

Adam Zdroik

Updated on July 2, 2026 3:02AM EST

World Cup

### Sign up for free to get the best advice and offers to dominate this season.

Subscribe Log In

From the latest news to creating the best starting lineup, we've got you covered - Sign-up today

# Switzerland vs Algeria Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 32

There is a built-in subplot to this one worth noting. Coach Vladimir Petkovic spent seven years in charge of Switzerland before handing the job to manager Murat Yakin in 2021, and now he is on the opposite bench trying to knock out the program he built. Petkovic knows this Swiss core about as well as anyone alive. The question is whether that familiarity matters more than the fact that Algeria has conceded seven goals in three grou

# PREVIEW | Switzerland vs Algeria: team news, lineups, predictions (World Cup 03/07) | OneFootball

Playmakerstats

·1 July 2026

## PREVIEW | Switzerland vs Algeria: team news, lineups, predictions (World Cup 03/07)

Go to the comments section Add to your bookmarksShare this article

Switzerland and Algeria face off this Friday at the BC Place in World Cup. The match will be broadcast live at 04:00 on BBC One.

In their last match, Switzerland prevailed 2-1 against Canada (World Cup 2026). In their last outing, Algeria drew 3-3 against Austria (World Cup 2026).

---

## OneFootball Videos

---

The last meeting between the two teams ended with Switzerland winning 2-0.

# Switzerland vs Algeria Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 32

There is a built-in subplot to this one worth noting. Coach Vladimir Petkovic spent seven years in charge of Switzerland before handing the job to manager Murat Yakin in 2021, and now he is on the opposite bench trying to knock out the program he built. ## PREVIEW | Switzerland vs Algeria: team news, lineups, predictions (World Cup 03/07)

Go to the comments section Add to your bookmarksShare this article

Switzerland and Algeria face off this Friday at the BC Place in World Cup. The match will be broadcast live at 04:00 on BBC One.

In their last match, Switzerland prevailed 2-1 against Canada (World Cup 2026). In their last outing, Algeria drew 3-3 against Austria (World Cup 2026).

---

The last meeting between the two teams ended with Switzerland winning 2-0.
